nasb.text: But if they had stood in My council, Then they would have announced My words to My people, And would have turned them back from their evil way And from the evil of their deeds.

esv.text: But if they had stood in my council, then they would have proclaimed my words to my people, and they would have turned them from their evil way, and from the evil of their deeds.

cnv.text: 如果他們曾參與我的議會， 就必向我的子民宣告我的信息， 使他們轉離他們的惡道， 離開他們的惡行。

ccb.text: 他们若曾站在我面前听我说话， 早就向我的子民宣告我的话， 使他们改邪归正了。”
